channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Federal Commission Halts Arizona’s Criminal Case Against Prediction Market Kalshi
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has successfully obtained a temporary restraining order that prevents Arizona from continuing its criminal case against prediction market platform Kalsh...

item.title: Susan Kihika Attends Lavish Nairobi Wedding with Family and President Ruto
item.description: Nakuru Governor Susan Kihika and her husband, businessman Sam Mburu, attended a grand wedding ceremony in Karen Blixen, Nairobi, alongside their family and several dignitaries. The event celebrated th...

item.title: Gauteng organised crime unit sergeant Fannie Nkosi under fire at Madlanga commission for alleged involvement in criminal activities
item.description: Sergeant Fannie Nkosi of the Gauteng organised crime unit has landed himself in hot water after giving testimony at the Madlanga commission. Instead of coming across as a dedicated officer fighting cr...

item.title: Police declare unlawful assembly during anti-ICE protest outside Los Angeles detention center
item.description: On April 11, 2026, a tense protest unfolded outside the Metropolitan Detention Center in downtown Los Angeles, where demonstrators gathered to express opposition to U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforc...

item.title: Tanzanian influencer Abdi Najma amuses fans with viral English video filmed in Tanzania
item.description: A Tanzanian influencer known as Abdi Najma went viral after posting a humorous clip where she spoke fluent English to Tanzanian men, leaving them puzzled. The video, shared on April 8, 2026, shows Naj...

item.title: Early political alignments and growing competition ahead of the Sokoto 2027 governorship election
item.description: As Nigeria dey prepare for the 2027 governorship election, Sokoto State don turn political hot zone where many big names dey form alliances and calculate their moves. Governor Ahmed Aliyu from APC dey...

item.title: Trump Attends UFC 327 in Miami, Meets Rogan and Rubio
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump made a high-profile appearance at UFC 327 in Miami on Saturday evening, generating considerable buzz among attendees. He arrived at the Kaseya Center shortly after 9 p...

item.title: FG Releases Updated List of Individuals and Groups Linked to Terrorism
item.description: The Federal Government don publish fresh list wey get 48 people and groups wey dem dey suspect say dem dey finance or support terrorism for Naija. Dis list come out through the Nigeria Sanctions Commi...

item.title: Insights from the UK Local and Regional Elections: Voter Trends and Uncertainty
item.description: Next month's elections across Scotland, Wales, and local councils in England will provide a significant test of public opinion since the 2024 general election. Reporter Matt Chorley travelled across t...

item.title: A father’s dilemma over his daughter’s desire for annulment
item.description: Sa artikulong ito, nagbubukas ang isang ama, si Eric, na nagtatanong sa kolumnistang si Dr. Margarita Holmes at kay Jeremy Baer hinggil sa kanyang anak na babae na 38 taong gulang, may asawa na at may...

item.title: Nyeri Toddler Tragically Killed in Family Dispute Over Sugarcane
item.description: In Ngondo village, Tetu Constituency, Nyeri, a tragic incident has shaken a local family and the wider community. Twenty-month-old Mary Wanjiru Muhinja was killed by her cousin, Linet Wangeci, reporte...

item.title: Telangana Board Releases 1st and 2nd Year Inter Marks Memo 2026: How to Access
item.description: The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education (TSBIE) has officially released the marks memos for both 1st and 2nd-year intermediate students for the year 2026. Students who appeared for the exa...

item.title: Hungarians express views ahead of election that may end Orbán's 16-year rule
item.description: Hungary is set for a pivotal election this Sunday that could bring an end to Viktor Orbán's 16-year tenure as Prime Minister. Orbán's supporters praise him as a defender of traditional Hungarian value...

item.title: EMB-NCR deploys drones and air monitors after Navotas landfill fire to ensure public safety
item.description: The Environmental Management Bureau-National Capital Region (EMB-NCR) has taken immediate action following a fire at the Navotas City Sanitary Landfill that started at 7:56 p.m. on Friday, April 10, 2...

item.title: India's Prototype Fast Breeder Reactor Marks Progress Amid Oversight Concerns
item.description: India’s Prototype Fast Breeder Reactor (PFBR), located in Kalpakkam and designed for a capacity of 500 MWe, represents a major step forward in the country’s long-term nuclear energy programme. A fast ...

item.title: UK delays Chagos Islands handover to Mauritius over US concerns
item.description: The UK government has decided to pause its plan to transfer sovereignty of the Chagos Islands to Mauritius after strong objections from US President Donald Trump, who labelled the deal a 'big mistake....

item.title: UN Leaders Call for Accountability Over Civilian Attacks in Middle East Conflict
item.description: Geneva: On Saturday, chiefs of various United Nations agencies issued a joint call urging an immediate end to violations of international humanitarian law in the Middle East. They expressed deep alarm...

item.title: Harambee Starlets beat India 2-0, prepare for final clash against Australia in Fifa Series
item.description: Kenya’s national women’s football team, Harambee Starlets, opened their 2026 Fifa Series campaign with an impressive 2-0 win over India at Nyayo Stadium in Nairobi. The victory secured them a spot in ...

item.title: Ebonyi Catholic Bishop Peter Chukwu Passes Away at 60
item.description: The Catholic Diocese of Abakaliki in Ebonyi State is in mourning as their bishop, Most Reverend Peter Nworie Chukwu, has passed on at the age of 60. The announcement was made on Saturday by the Vicar ...

item.title: IPID Report Reignites Debate Over Presidential Accountability in Phala Phala Case
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa faces growing demands for impeachment following the release of the long-awaited Independent Police Investigative Directorate (IPID) report into the 2020 Phala Phala farm robb...
